summary: Completed testing of Product Setup enhancements: 1) Extras with quantity and unit fields, 2) Packaging items linking, 3) Recipe quantities. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified all features display correctly in both Add and Edit Product forms.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: ProductCreate model (server.py lines 1081-1099) correctly includes packaging_items, recipe_quantities, and extras fields
Code review passed: ProductResponse model (server.py lines 1101-1122) correctly returns all new fields
Code review passed: POST /api/products endpoint (lines 2438-2454) correctly saves all new fields including extras with quantity/unit
Code review passed: PUT /api/products endpoint (lines 2486-2496) correctly updates all fields
Code review passed: GET /api/products endpoint (lines 2456-2475) returns packaging_items, extras, recipe_quantities
Code review passed: Frontend Add Product form (Settings.js lines 3724-3805) has extras section with quantity and unit fields
Code review passed: Frontend Edit Product form (Settings.js lines 4247-4367) has extras section with quantity and unit fields
Code review passed: Frontend Edit Product form (Settings.js lines 4028-4090) has packaging items linking section with automatic cost calculation
seed_data_creation: Created test products with extras, packaging_items, and recipe_quantities during backend tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Setup features verified: 1) Extras now have quantity and unit fields - tested in both Add and Edit Product forms. 2) Packaging items section allows linking packaging materials with automatic cost calculation. 3) Recipe quantities field added to products. Backend APIs correctly save and return all new fields. Frontend forms display all fields correctly with proper Arabic labels.

tests_performed.details: Created product with extras containing quantity (2 شريحة, 30 غرام) and verified fields saved correctly
Created product with packaging_items (علبة كرتون, أكياس بلاستيك) with quantity and cost_per_unit
Created product with recipe_quantities (دقيق 500 غرام, زيت 100 مل)
Updated product extras with new quantity (2 ملعقة, 50 غرام) and verified persistence
Updated product packaging_items and verified persistence
Verified extras, packaging_items, recipe_quantities fields return correctly in list
Verified single product returns all fields with correct values

tests_performed.feature: Frontend - Add Product form extras section
tests_performed.details: Found الإضافات المتاحة section with quantity input and unit dropdown (قطعة, غرام, ملعقة, كوب, شريحة)

tests_performed.feature: Frontend - Edit Product form extras section
tests_performed.details: Found extras section showing existing extras with quantity and unit (e.g., جبنة موزاريلا 50 غرام +700 د.ع)

tests_performed.feature: Frontend - Edit Product packaging items section
tests_performed.details: Found ربط بمواد التغليف section with linked items showing quantity, unit, and cost
Found تكلفة المواد الخام and تكلفة التغليف fields with helper text
